name: sukhrob-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sukhrob Ilyosbekov - pre-bundled, no install step.

plugins.name: vk
plugins.description: VK.com channel for Claude Code - DM and group-chat bridge with message history, search, attachments, and remote permission relay.

plugins.name: jobpilot
plugins.description: JobPilot - search job boards, tailor resumes, and auto-apply from Claude Code or Codex. Run the `setup` skill to install the local agent; campaigns run through the agent terminal in your JobPilot dashboard.
